betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Random Teleport§f

§aStuck in a depleted area or looking for a fresh building site?§f
The Random Teleport utility allows you to instantly warp to untouched, distant coordinates within your current dimension, bypassing long travel times.

§6Teleportation Parameters§f:
§b• Controlled Range§f: Warp to a random location between §c256§f and §c1,024 blocks§f away from your current position.
§b• Safe Landing Guaranteed§f: The system uses an infinite search loop to find a safe landing block. You will never spawn inside solid blocks, lava, or high in the air.
§b• 5-Minute Cooldown§f: There is a §c300-second (5-minute) cooldown§f between teleports to prevent spamming, so choose your landing spot wisely.
§b• Same Dimension Only§f: Inter-dimensional teleportation is §cdisabled§f; you will always remain within the same dimension where you ran the command.

§6Command§f:
§9/rtp§f — Type this in chat to trigger a random teleportation.

§eTip§f: Use this command to escape over-mined terrain around spawn and discover completely fresh resource nodes far away.
